title: Nepali cannabis linked to booth capturing in India - Nepal News | Nepal's First Online News Portal
description: Nepali cannabis linked to booth capturing in India  Nepal News | Nepal's First Online News Portal
publisher.title: Nepal News | Nepal's First Online News Portal
full_article:
One issue closely associated with election fairness is “booth capture,” meaning the takeover of polling stations. After the restoration of multi-party democracy in Nepal, some elections witnessed incidents in certain rural areas such as booth capturing, riots, and ballot box looting.

The source of this electoral malpractice in Nepal is often traced to the Indian state of Bihar. Interestingly, when examining the history of booth capturing in Bihar’s politics, its connection appears linked to Nepal, specifically to the smuggling of Nepali cannabis.

In India’s 1957 Lok Sabha election, booth capturing occurred in Rachiyari village of Begusarai district in Bihar. According to the Election Commission of India, this was the first recorded instance of booth capturing in the country. The act was carried out by Kamdev Singh, a local bandit active in Bihar’s villages, on behalf of Sarayu Prasad Singh, the candidate of the ruling Indian National Congress. Begusarai district was Kamdev’s stronghold.

Rachiyari village in Begusarai district of Bihar, where Kamdev Singh first captured a booth in 1957. Photo source: ETV India

However, despite the booth capturing, Sarayu could not win. Chandrashekhar Singh of the Communist Party of India (CPI) emerged victorious.

According to the book When Crime Pays (2017) by Milan Vaishnav, which discusses the use of money and muscle power in Indian politics, the incident was not only the first instance of booth capturing in Indian elections but also marked the beginning of criminalization in Indian politics. Through this act, Kamdev gained notoriety as the pioneer of booth capturing in Indian elections.

In subsequent elections after 1957, booth capturing continued under his leadership. Over time, leveraging this practice, he expanded his criminal empire with growing political access and protection. The operations of this criminal network were directly linked to the trade in cannabis produced in Nepal.

Vaishnav’s book notes that during the 1960s and 1970s, Kamdev was a prominent figure in Bihar’s political circles. “He was among the most notorious hired criminals and served as a feared gang leader for the Indian Congress Party. He was used for booth capturing,” the book states.

Former Indian journalist Harivansh Narayan Singh, now Deputy Chairman of the Rajya Sabha, the upper house of Indian parliament, wrote in Ravivar magazine that Kamdev was the individual who initiated mafia-style rule in Bihar.

Initially, booth capturing was limited to using intimidation and violence at polling stations to force votes in one’s favor. Over time, its form evolved. It later included stamping ballots directly, preventing voters from reaching polling stations, and influencing officials to set up polling centers only in areas under their control.

In subsequent elections after 1957, booth capturing continued under his leadership. Over time, leveraging this practice, he expanded his criminal empire with growing political access and protection.

According to When Crime Pays , by the 1971 election, booth capturing had spread beyond Bihar. The Election Commission reported that booth capturing occurred that year in Haryana, Jammu and Kashmir, Nagaland, Odisha, and Uttar Pradesh. According to a report published by Aaj Tak , in the 1969 and 1971 Lok Sabha elections, Kamdev captured 34 booths in Begusarai and ensured victory for Indian Congress candidate Shyam Nandan Mishra.

The practice of booth capturing initiated by Kamdev became even more widespread after his time. In the 1989 Lok Sabha election, re-polling was conducted in 1,670 booths due to capture incidents. In Bihar alone, re-polling occurred in 1,046 booths in 1991 and 1,273 booths in 1996.

Muscle power in Bihar elections was so rampant that a popular saying went: “To contest elections in Bihar, you need at least a hundred armed men.” People like Kamdev Singh were responsible for assembling such armed groups for candidates. In Bihar, which shares a border with Nepal, he frequently carried out booth captures.

The strength behind Kamdev’s booth capturing operations came from the gang he built for smuggling cannabis from Nepal. The financial backbone of that network was the enormous income generated from cannabis smuggling.

The Nepali cannabis connection

Known as the “Cannabis Emperor,” Kamdev was often called the “Pablo Escobar of Bihar.” Pablo Escobar of Colombia was one of the world’s most notorious drug traffickers during the 1980s and early 1990s.

Anil Kumar Anal (75), a veteran journalist from Rajbiraj, Saptari, still vividly remembers Kamdev’s activities from five decades ago. According to him, around 2028–2030 BS (early 1970s), buses traveling from Birgunj to Rajbiraj would arrive with roofs loaded full of steel utensils. At the time, India did not allow easy import of foreign goods, so items like stainless steel utensils, nylon clothes, and ropes were smuggled. The person involved in this smuggling was Kamdev. To smuggle these goods from Nepal into India, Kamdev operated from Inarwa in Rajbiraj. The materials were collected in Inarwa and then transported across the border.

At that time, the now commonly used Rupani Road to Rajbiraj had not yet been built; all vehicles traveled via Hanumannagar. The utensils transported by bus were unloaded in Inarwa, a few kilometers from Hanumannagar. “It wasn’t just utensils,” Anal says. “Smuggled goods including cannabis were collected in Inarwa. Cannabis was brought from Siraha—some carried it by hand, others transported it by truck or jeep. From there, it was ferried across the Koshi River by boat into India.”

Locals of Yamunamai Rural Municipality Ward 2 of Rautahat running away with ballot boxes in the local level elections held on 13 May 2022. Photo: Sanjay Kumar Mishra

According to Anal, Kamdev had deployed around 200 people in and around Inarwa for this operation. He maintained large warehouses and numerous vehicles in Hanumannagar and Bhimnagar (India). “Inarwa was like his headquarters; I met him there once,” he recalls. “Kamdev was built like a wrestler, very large and imposing.”

After being accused in a murder case in 1972, Kamdev spent most of his time hiding around the Rajbiraj area.

“Around 2030 BS (1973), he was arrested in Rajbiraj with a truck full of cannabis,” Anal says. “That truck remained parked in the courtyard of the zonal administrator’s office for a long time.” In that case, Kamdev was imprisoned and had to pay a fine of Rs 1.8 million.

Before Nepal enforced a strict legal policy against narcotics, Kamdev had cultivated cannabis in Nepal itself. According to reports in Indian media citing his family members, he had obtained a license in Nepal and cultivated cannabis on 200 bighas of land. The Narcotics Control Act of 2033 BS (1976 AD) categorized cannabis as a hard drug.

Parallel power along the border

From the 1960s until he was killed on May 15, 1980, Kamdev ran a parallel authority in the Nepal–India border region. He built a large army of young men who were ready to kill and die for him.

Kamdev himself stayed in Nepal while operating the cannabis smuggling business. At that time, no smuggling across the border was possible without his involvement or support. Cross-border smuggling between Nepal and India was under his control. Indian journalist and author Santosh Singh described Kamdev as the “Smuggling King” of northern India during his time. In the book Kamdev Singh: The Original Godfather of Indian Politics , Santosh writes: “The biggest proof that Kamdev Singh was the king of smuggling in northern India was his network, which extended along the Nepal–India border from Pithoragarh in Uttar Pradesh (now Uttarakhand) to Siliguri in West Bengal. No organized smuggler could operate along the Nepal–India border without Kamdev’s permission.”

While based in Nepal, he smuggled cannabis and other goods from Nepal into India. The contraband he transported, including cannabis, was stockpiled in his own village of Lawa. From this village, located on the banks of the Ganges River and beyond the effective reach of police administration, smuggled goods were dispatched as far west as Kolkata and Mumbai. Santosh writes, “He initially built his smuggling network through cannabis trafficking, and then expanded into other areas of smuggling.”

Kamdev cultivated an image among local people as a helpful and generous man. Economically struggling villagers looked to him for financial support. He would assist people from birth to death in his village and surrounding areas, which earned him their loyalty. Many were willing to kill or die for him. Using that loyalty, he expanded his operations.

For cannabis smuggling, Kamdev organized a large group of young men from his village and nearby areas. The book describes: “The youths he recruited for smuggling would travel by bus from Begusarai to the Nepal border, enter Nepal posing as laborers doing small jobs, collect cannabis from traders, and then walk overnight back to Lawa village.” For this operation alone, he built a group of 300 youths.

According to Santosh’s book, by 1965 Kamdev had provided employment to 6,000 people across 40 villages. His workforce was spread from Begusarai to towns along the India–Nepal border and as far as Kolkata and Mumbai. “At a time when an ordinary government employee in India earned INR 600 a month, those working for him earned up to INR 6,000 monthly,” the book notes.

On May 15, 1980, Kamdev was killed in a police encounter in Lawa village. His family members, however, have claimed it was an extrajudicial killing. In Begusarai district alone, 74 criminal cases had been registered against him.

Kamdev had 100 sharpshooters, some of whom were former members of Indian security forces. They were deployed to protect shipments, capture polling booths, and provide personal security.

He paid fixed monthly sums to police and administrative officials, allowing his smuggling operations to run uninterrupted. He did not hesitate to eliminate those who obstructed his work.

Just before Nepal’s 1990 People’s Movement (2046 BS), former Nepal Police DIG Hemant Malla was transferred to Siraha. By then, nearly a decade had passed since Kamdev’s death, but Malla heard many stories about him from police and the public. “It was said that even if police merely placed their cap along a cannabis smuggling route, the money that had to be paid would be left behind,” Malla recalls.

Because of his role in booth capturing during elections, Kamdev had deep connections with political leaders. “Kamdev believed nothing could happen to him because then–Indian Prime Minister Indira Gandhi was like a daughter to him,” says Anal.

On May 15, 1980, Kamdev was killed in a police encounter in Lawa village. His family members, however, have claimed it was an extrajudicial killing. In Begusarai district alone, 74 criminal cases had been registered against him.

Born in 1930, Kamdev initially engaged in petty banditry. In 1959, while imprisoned in Munger jail in Bihar, he met several cannabis smugglers and learned the trade from them. After his release, he used that knowledge to quickly become powerful.

Kamdev Singh, who was killed in a police operation, with his son.

Although Kamdev was killed, the smuggling legacy he built continues to influence Bihar’s politics. According to DIG Malla, even today smuggling activities involving Nepal operate on the foundation he established. “Like in other businesses, there is generational transfer. Even if not to one’s own children, close relatives and associates carry it forward,” he says. According to him, large quantities of cannabis seized in Nepal are mostly found in areas bordering the Indian state of Bihar.

Just as opium shaped Asian geopolitics in the 19th century, Nepali cannabis played a similar role in Bihar’s politics. The illegal opium trade tied to colonial commerce and finance even triggered wars. After China’s defeat in the Opium Wars nearly 200 years ago, the once-powerful nation declined, while the British grew dominant in Asia.

In Bihar, the illegal economy linked to Nepali cannabis transformed crime, smuggling networks, and local political structures during the 1960s and 1970s. The nexus between smugglers and politicians did not only affect Bihar’s politics; as the trend spread into Nepal, it became infamous as “Bihari politics.” The use of muscle power in elections—considered the beauty of democracy—has weakened people’s faith in the democratic system.
translated:
चुनावी निष्पक्षता स॑ गहराई स॑ जुड़लऽ एगो मुद्दा छै “बूथ कैप्चर”, मतलब मतदान केंद्रऽ प॑ कब्जा । नेपाल मे बहुदलीय लोकतंत्रक पुनर्स्थापनक बाद किछु चुनाव मे किछु खास ग्रामीण क्षेत्र मे बूथ कैप्चरिंग, दंगा, मतपेटी लूट जेहन घटना देखल गेल ।

नेपाल मे एहि चुनावी कदाचार क स्रोत प्रायः भारतीय राज्य बिहार स पता चलैत अछि । मजेदार बात ई छै कि बिहार के राजनीति में बूथ कैप्चरिंग के इतिहास के जांच करला पर एकरऽ संबंध नेपाल स॑ जुड़लऽ नजर आबै छै, खास करी क॑ नेपाली भांग के तस्करी स॑ ।

भारत के 1957 के लोकसभा चुनाव में बिहार के बेगूसराय जिला के राचियारी गाम में बूथ कैप्चरिंग भेल छल. भारत निर्वाचन आयोग के अनुसार देश मे बूथ कैप्चरिंग के ई पहिल रिकॉर्ड घटना छल. सत्ताधारी भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस के उम्मीदवार सरयू प्रसाद सिंह के तरफ सं ई काज बिहार के गाम मे सक्रिय स्थानीय डाकू कामदेव सिंह केने छलाह. बेगूसराय जिला कामदेवक गढ़ छल |

बिहार के बेगूसराय जिला के राचियारी गाम, जतय कामदेव सिंह पहिल बेर 1957 मे एकटा बूथ पर कब्जा केने छलाह.फोटो स्रोत: ईटीवी इंडिया

मुदा बूथ पर कब्जा केलाक बादो सरयू जीत नहि पाबि सकलाह । भारतीय कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी के चंद्रशेखर सिंह विजयी उभरल।

मिलन वैष्णव केरऽ किताब When Crime Pays (2017) के अनुसार, जेकरा म॑ भारतीय राजनीति म॑ पैसा आरू मांसपेशी शक्ति के उपयोग के चर्चा करलऽ गेलऽ छै, ई घटना न सिर्फ भारतीय चुनाव म॑ बूथ कैप्चरिंग के पहलऽ घटना छेलै बल्कि भारतीय राजनीति म॑ अपराधीकरण के शुरुआत भी छेलै । एहि अधिनियम क माध्यम स कामदेव भारतीय चुनाव मे बूथ कैप्चरिंग क अग्रणी क रूप मे बदनामी हासिल केलथि।

1957 के बाद के चुनाव में हुनकर नेतृत्व में बूथ कैप्चरिंग जारी रहल। समय के साथ ई प्रथा के लाभ उठाबैत हुनी बढ़तऽ राजनीतिक पहुँच आरू सुरक्षा के साथ अपनऽ आपराधिक साम्राज्य के विस्तार करलकै । एहि आपराधिक संजाल के संचालन सीधा नेपाल मे उत्पादित भांग के कारोबार स जुड़ल छल ।

वैष्णव केरऽ किताब म॑ कहलऽ गेलऽ छै कि 1960 आरू 1970 के दशक के दौरान कामदेव बिहार केरऽ राजनीतिक हलका म॑ एगो प्रमुख हस्ती छेलै । किताब मे कहल गेल अछि जे, ओ सबस कुख्यात भाड़ा पर लेल गेल अपराधी मे शामिल छलाह आ भारतीय कांग्रेस पार्टी क लेल एकटा भयावह गिरोह क नेता क रूप मे काज केलथि, हुनकर उपयोग बूथ कैप्चरिंग मे कैल जाइत छल।

भारतीय संसद केरऽ उच्च सदन राज्यसभा केरऽ अब॑ उपाध्यक्ष भारतीय पत्रकार हरिवंश नारायण सिंह न॑ रविवर पत्रिका म॑ लिखलकै कि कामदेव वू व्यक्ति छेलै जे बिहार म॑ माफिया शैली के शासन के शुरूआत करलकै ।

शुरू मे बूथ कैप्चरिंग मतदान केंद्र पर धमकी आओर हिंसा के इस्तेमाल करि अपन पक्ष मे वोट देबय लेल मजबूर करय तक सीमित छल. समयक संग एकर रूप विकसित होइत गेल। बाद म॑ एकरा म॑ सीधा मतदान प॑ मुहर लगाना, मतदाता क॑ मतदान केंद्र प॑ पहुँचै स॑ रोकना, आरू अधिकारियऽ क॑ प्रभावित करना शामिल छेलै कि वू केवल ओकरऽ नियंत्रण म॑ रहलऽ इलाका म॑ ही मतदान केंद्र लगाबै ।

1957 के बाद के चुनाव में हुनकर नेतृत्व में बूथ कैप्चरिंग जारी रहल। समय के साथ ई प्रथा के लाभ उठाबैत हुनी बढ़तऽ राजनीतिक पहुँच आरू सुरक्षा के साथ अपनऽ आपराधिक साम्राज्य के विस्तार करलकै ।

When Crime Pays क अनुसार 1971 क चुनाव तक बूथ कैप्चरिंग बिहार स बाहर सेहो पसरि गेल छल। चुनाव आयोग केरऽ रिपोर्ट छै कि वू साल हरियाणा, जम्मू-कश्मीर, नागालैंड, ओडिशा, आरू उत्तर प्रदेश म॑ बूथ कैप्चरिंग होय गेलऽ छेलै । आज तक द्वारा प्रकाशित एक रिपोर्ट के अनुसार 1969 आरू 1971 के लोकसभा चुनाव म॑ कामदेव न॑ बेगूसराय केरऽ 34 बूथ प॑ कब्जा करी क॑ भारतीय कांग्रेस केरऽ उम्मीदवार श्याम नंदन मिश्र क॑ जीत सुनिश्चित करलकै ।

कामदेव द्वारा शुरू कयल गेल बूथ कैप्चरिंगक प्रथा हुनक समयक बाद आओर बेसी व्यापक भ गेल । 1989 क लोकसभा चुनाव मे कैप्चर क घटना क कारण 1670 बूथ पर फेर स मतदान भेल। असगर बिहार मे 1991 मे 1046 बूथ आ 1996 मे 1273 बूथ मे फेर स मतदान भेल।

बिहार चुनाव मे मांसपेशी शक्ति एतेक व्याप्त छल जे एकटा लोकप्रिय कहावत छल: “बिहार मे चुनाव लड़बा लेल कम स कम सौ हथियारबंद आदमी चाही।” उम्मीदवार के लेल एहन सशस्त्र समूह के जुटाबय के जिम्मेदारी कामदेव सिंह सन लोक के छल. नेपाल स सीमा साझा करय वाला बिहार मे ओ बेर-बेर बूथ कैप्चर करैत छलाह।

कामदेव के बूथ कैप्चरिंग ऑपरेशन के पाछु के ताकत ओहि गिरोह सं मिलल जे ओ नेपाल सं भांग के तस्करी के लेल बनौने छलाह. ओहि नेटवर्क के आर्थिक रीढ़ छल भांग के तस्करी सं भेटय वाला भारी आमदनी.

नेपाली भांग कनेक्शन

“भांग सम्राट” के नाम सँ जानल जाय वाला कामदेव के प्रायः “बिहार के पाबलो एस्कोबार” कहल जाइत छल | कोलंबिया केरऽ पाब्लो एस्कोबार 1980 के दशक आरू 1990 केरऽ दशक केरऽ शुरुआत के दौरान दुनिया केरऽ सबसें कुख्यात ड्रग तस्करऽ म॑ स॑ एक छेलै ।

सप्तरी के राजविराज के दिग्गज पत्रकार अनिल कुमार अनल (75) के एखनहु पांच दशक पहिने के कामदेव के गतिविधि के सजीव रूप सं याद अछि. हुनकऽ अनुसार २०२८–२०३० बी.एस.(१९७० के दशक के प्रारंभ) के आसपास वीरगंज स॑ राजविराज जाय वाला बस स्टील के बर्तन स॑ भरलऽ छत भरलऽ आबी जाय छेलै । ओहि समय भारत मे विदेशी वस्तुक सहज आयात नहि होइत छल, तेँ स्टेनलेस स्टील केर बर्तन, नायलॉन कपड़ा, रस्सी सन वस्तुक तस्करी होइत छल | एहि तस्करी मे शामिल व्यक्ति कामदेव छलाह । नेपाल सँ भारत मे तस्करी करबाक लेल कामदेव राजविराजक इनरवा सँ परिचालन करैत छल । ई सामग्री इनरवा में एकत्रित करलऽ गेलै आरू ओकरा बाद सीमा पार करी क॑ पहुँचाय देलऽ गेलै ।

ओहि समय मे आब आम प्रचलित रूपाणी रोड राजविराज धरि एखन धरि नहि बनल छल; सब वाहन हनुमाननगर होइत छल। बस स ल जायल गेल बर्तन हनुमाननगर स किछु किलोमीटर दूर इनरवा मे उतारल गेल। अनल कहैत छथि, “ई खाली बर्तन नहि छल.” “इनरवा मे भांग सहित तस्करी सामान जमा होइत छल। सिराहा सँ भांग आनल जाइत छल-किछु हाथ सँ ल’ जाइत छल, कियो ट्रक वा जीप सँ पहुँचाबैत छल। ओतय सँ कोशी नदी पार क’ नाव सँ भारत मे पहुँचाओल जाइत छल।”

रौतहटके यमुनामाई गाउँपालिका वडा २ के स्थानीयवासी १३ मई २०२२ के स्थानीय तहके निर्वाचनमे मतपेटी लऽ कऽ भागैत ।फोटो : संजय कुमार मिश्र

अनल के अनुसार कामदेव एहि अभियान के लेल इनरवा आओर आसपास करीब 200 लोक के तैनात केने छलाह. हनुमाननगर आ भीमनगर (भारत) मे पैघ गोदाम आ अनेक वाहन के रखरखाव केलनि । ओ स्मरण करैत कहैत छथि, “इनरवा हुनकर मुख्यालय जकाँ छलाह, एक बेर ओतय हुनका सं भेंट भेल छलनि।” “कामदेव पहलवान जकाँ बनल छल, बहुत पैघ आ भव्य।”

1972 मे एकटा हत्याक मामला मे आरोपी बनलाक बाद कामदेव बेसी समय राजविराज इलाका मे नुका कए बिताबैत छलाह।

अनल कहैत छथि, “बीएस २०३० (१९७३) के आसपास राजविराज मे भांग सँ भरल ट्रक ल’ क’ गिरफ्तार कएल गेल छल । “ओ ट्रक बहुत दिन धरि जोनल एडमिनिस्ट्रेटर’क ऑफिस’क आँगन मे ठाढ़ रहल.” ओहि मामला मे कामदेव कए जेल मे बंद क देल गेल आ 18 लाख टका क जुर्माना चुकाबय पड़ल।

नेपाल मादक पदार्थक विरुद्ध सख्त कानूनी नीति लागू करबासँ पहिने कामदेव नेपालमे स्वयं भांगक खेती केने छलाह । भारतीय मीडिया मे अपन परिवारक सदस्यक हवाला दैत खबरि अनुसार ओ नेपाल मे लाइसेंस प्राप्त कए 200 बीघा जमीन पर भांगक खेती केने छलाह। 2033 बीएस (1976 ई.) केरऽ मादक पदार्थ नियंत्रण अधिनियम म॑ भांग क॑ कठोर दवाई के रूप म॑ श्रेणीबद्ध करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै ।

सीमा के साथ समानांतर शक्ति

1960 के दशक स 15 मई 1980 के हत्या तक कामदेव नेपाल–भारत सीमा क्षेत्र में समानांतर प्राधिकरण चलाबैत छलाह । ओ युवकक एकटा पैघ सेना बनौलनि जे हुनका लेल मारय आ मरय लेल तैयार छल |

भांग तस्करी के कारोबार चलाबैत काल कामदेव स्वयं नेपाल मे रहलाह। ओहि समय बिना हुनकर संलग्नता या सहयोग के सीमा पार कोनो तस्करी संभव नहि छल । नेपाल आ भारतक बीच सीमा पारक तस्करी हुनक नियंत्रण मे छल । भारतीय पत्रकार आरू लेखक संतोष सिंह न॑ कामदेव क॑ अपनऽ समय म॑ उत्तर भारत केरऽ “तस्करी राजा” बतैलकै । कामदेव सिंह: भारतीय राजनीति के मूल गॉडफादर , पुस्तक में संतोष लिखै छै: “उत्तर भारत में तस्करी के राजा कामदेव सिंह के सबसे बड़ऽ प्रमाण हुनकऽ नेटवर्क छेलै, जे नेपाल–भारत सीमा के साथ उत्तर प्रदेश (अब उत्तराखंड) के पिथौरागढ़ स॑ ल॑ क॑ पश्चिम बंगाल के सिलीगुड़ी तक फैललऽ छेलै नेपाल–भारत सीमा बिना कामदेव’क अनुमति।”

नेपाल मे रहैत ओ नेपाल सँ भांग आ अन्य सामान भारत मे तस्करी करैत छलाह । भांग सहित ओ जे कांट्राबैंड ढोबैत छलाह, ओकर भंडार हुनकर अपन गाम लावा मे भ गेल छल। गंडक नदी के कात में स्थित आ पुलिस प्रशासन के प्रभावी पहुंच स बाहर एहि गाम स तस्करी के सामान पश्चिम तक कोलकाता आ मुंबई तक भेजल जाइत छल | संतोष लिखै छै, “शुरुआत में भांग के तस्करी के माध्यम स॑ अपनऽ तस्करी नेटवर्क बनैलकै, आरू ओकरा बाद तस्करी के अन्य क्षेत्रऽ म॑ भी विस्तार करलकै।”

कामदेव एकटा सहायक आ उदार आदमी के रूप में स्थानीय लोक के बीच छवि के खेती केलनि। आर्थिक रूपेँ संघर्षरत ग्रामीण लोकनि आर्थिक सहयोगक लेल हुनका दिस तकैत छलाह । ओ अपन गाम आ आसपासक इलाका मे जन्म सँ मृत्यु धरि लोकक सहायता करैत छलाह, जाहि सँ हुनका निष्ठा भेटैत छलनि । कतेको गोटे हुनका लेल मारय वा मरय लेल तैयार छलाह । ओहि निष्ठा के उपयोग करैत ओ अपन संचालन के विस्तार केलनि।

भांग के तस्करी के लेल कामदेव अपन गाम आ लग के इलाका के युवक के एकटा पैघ समूह के संगठित केलनि। पोथी मे वर्णन अछि: “तस्करी लेल ओ जे युवा सब भर्ती केने छलाह, ओ सब बेगूसराय स बस स नेपाल सीमा तक जाइत छलाह, छोट-छोट काज करैत मजदूर क रूप मे नेपाल मे प्रवेश करैत छलाह, व्यापारी स भांग जमा करैत छलाह, आ फेर राति भरि पैदल वापस लवा गाम जाइत छलाह।” असगर एहि ऑपरेशन लेल ओ 300 युवा क ग्रुप बनेलथि।

संतोषक पोथीक अनुसार 1965 धरि कामदेव 40 गाम मे 6000 लोक केँ रोजगार द’ देने छलाह. हुनकऽ कार्यबल बेगूसराय स॑ भारत–नेपाल सीमा के साथ-साथ कोलकाता आरू मुंबई तक के शहरऽ म॑ फैललऽ छेलै । किताब मे कहल गेल अछि जे, ओहि समय मे जखन भारत मे एकटा साधारण सरकारी कर्मचारी 600 रुपया महीना कमाइत छल, ओहि समय मे हुनका लेल काज करय वाला कए 6000 रुपया तक मासिक कमाई होइत छल।

15 मई 1980 कए लवा गाम मे पुलिस मुठभेड़ मे कामदेव क मौत भ गेल छल। हालांकि हुनकऽ परिवार के लोगऽ न॑ ई दावा करल॑ छै कि ई एगो गैर-न्यायिक हत्या छेलै । असगर बेगूसराय जिला मे हुनका पर 74 आपराधिक मामला दर्ज भ गेल छल।

कामदेव के पास १०० शार्पशूटर छेलै, जेकरा म॑ स॑ कुछ भारतीय सुरक्षा बल के पूर्व सदस्य छेलै । ई सब खेप के सुरक्षा, मतदान बूथ पर कब्जा करै, आरू व्यक्तिगत सुरक्षा प्रदान करै लेली तैनात करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै ।

पुलिस आ प्रशासनिक अधिकारी कए निश्चित मासिक राशि दैत छलाह, जाहि स हुनकर तस्करी क काज निर्बाध रूप स चलैत छल। हुनकर काज मे बाधा पहुंचेनिहार के समाप्त करबा मे कोनो संकोच नहि केलनि।

नेपाल के १९९० के जन आन्दोलन (२०४६ बी.एस.) स ठीक पहिने नेपाल पुलिस के पूर्व डीआईजी हेमंत मल्ल के सिराहा स्थानांतरित क देल गेल छल । ता धरि कामदेवक मृत्युक लगभग एक दशक बीति गेल छल, मुदा मल्ला पुलिस आ जनता सँ हुनका बारे मे बहुत रास खिस्सा सुनैत छल. मल्ला स्मरण करैत कहैत छथि जे कहल गेल छल जे पुलिस भले मात्र भांग तस्करी क मार्ग पर अपन टोपी राखि देत, मुदा जे पाइ देबय पड़त ओ पाछु रहि जायत।

चुनाव के दौरान बूथ कैप्चरिंग में अपन भूमिका के कारण कामदेव के राजनीतिक नेता सब सं गहींर संबंध छल. अनल कहैत छथि, “कामदेव के विश्वास छल जे हुनका संग किछु नहि भ सकैत अछि, किया कि तखन–भारत के प्रधानमंत्री इंदिरा गांधी हुनका लेल बेटी जेकाँ छलीह।”

15 मई 1980 कए लवा गाम मे पुलिस मुठभेड़ मे कामदेव क मौत भ गेल छल। हालांकि हुनकऽ परिवार के लोगऽ न॑ ई दावा करल॑ छै कि ई एगो गैर-न्यायिक हत्या छेलै । असगर बेगूसराय जिला मे हुनका पर 74 आपराधिक मामला दर्ज भ गेल छल।

1930 मे जन्मल कामदेव शुरू मे क्षुद्र डाकू काज मे लागल छलाह। 1959 मे बिहार क मुंगेर जेल मे बंद रहैत कईटा भांग तस्कर स भेंट भेल आ हुनका स इ धंधा सीखल गेल। रिहाई के बाद ओहि ज्ञान के उपयोग जल्दी स शक्तिशाली भ गेलाह।

पुलिस अभियान मे मारल गेल कामदेव सिंह अपन बेटाक संग।

हालांकि कामदेव के हत्या भ गेल छल मुदा हुनकर बनल तस्करी के विरासत बिहार के राजनीति पर असर डालैत अछि. डीआईजी मल्ला के अनुसार आइयो नेपाल स जुड़ल तस्करी के काज हुनकर स्थापित फाउंडेशन पर संचालित अछि। ओ कहैत छथि जे आन व्यवसाय मे जेनरेशनल ट्रांसफर होइत अछि, भले अपन बच्चा मे नहि हो, करीबी रिश्तेदार आ सहयोगी एकरा आगू बढ़बैत छथि। हुनकऽ अनुसार नेपाल म॑ जब्त करलऽ गेलऽ भारी मात्रा म॑ भांग अधिकतर भारत केरऽ बिहार राज्य के सीमा वाला इलाका म॑ मिलै छै ।

जेना 19वीं सदी मे अफीम एशियाई भूराजनीति कए आकार देलक तहिना बिहार क राजनीति मे नेपाली भांग क सेहो एहने भूमिका छल । औपनिवेशिक वाणिज्य आ वित्त स जुड़ल अवैध अफीम क कारोबार युद्ध तक शुरू क देलक। लगभग 200 साल पहिने अफीम युद्ध मे चीन के हार के बाद कहियो शक्तिशाली राष्ट्र के गिरावट आयल, जखन कि एशिया मे अंग्रेज के दबदबा बढ़ल.

बिहार मे नेपाली भांग स जुड़ल अवैध अर्थव्यवस्था 1960 आ 1970 क दशक मे अपराध, तस्करी नेटवर्क, आ स्थानीय राजनीतिक संरचना कए बदलि देलक। तस्कर आ राजनीतिज्ञक बीचक गठजोड़क असर बिहारक राजनीति पर त’ पड़ल; जेना-जेना ई प्रवृत्ति नेपाल मे पसरल, ई “बिहारी राजनीति” के नाम सँ बदनाम भेल। चुनाव में मांसपेशी शक्ति के प्रयोग-जेकरा लोकतंत्र के सुंदरता मानल जाइत अछि-लोकतांत्रिक व्यवस्था पर लोक के विश्वास कमजोर भ’ गेल अछि.

title: PM Karki appeals to voters to actively participate in HoR election - Nepal News | Nepal's First Online News Portal
description: PM Karki appeals to voters to actively participate in HoR election  Nepal News | Nepal's First Online News Portal
publisher.title: Nepal News | Nepal's First Online News Portal
full_article:
KATHMANDU: Prime Minister Sushila Karki has appealed to all voters to actively participate in the House of Representatives (HoR) election scheduled for March 5 so that country would make headway to political stability and prosperity.

In her address to the nation today, PM Karki reminded the Nepalis to decide their and children’s future through the voting. “Casting votes is not simply stamping on ballot papers and electing leaders, but a moment to determine the future- of yours and your children,” PM Karki stressed, urging all voters to reach the nearby voting centres and cast ballots by brushing aside all other activities coming Thursday, March 5.

“On the eve of HoR election, I request all of you to maintain peace and order. Peace is Nepalis’ identity,” the PM stated.

According to her, country is at a decisive moment, so the March 5 election is the time to determine the individual and country’s future. She shared that she had taken the leadership at a difficult time of history. “I’ve taken it as my responsibility towards nation to give leadership to the country by handling the critical situation,” the Head of government said, “I always stood for justice and honesty, carrying out my duty accordingly. After some days, the country would be led by the representatives you’re going to elect through the March 5 election.”

The PM also hoped exchange of greeting and happiness on Holi festival. “Let’s make the March 5 election peaceful, fair and historic,” she appealed.

She further reminded the critical, challenging and difficult time following the Gen Z movement. “Transition from the violent state to a peaceful solution and bringing country back on a constitutional track was first priority,” PM Karki informed.

Election for living democracy

PM Karki thanked all political parties and independent candidates for their readiness of election fray.”Your activism makes our democracy living. Election is held in a healthy and competitive atmosphere. There are varying opinions, but we should not harbour misunderstanding and enmity,” she underscored.

The PM urged political parties, candidates and supporters to abide by election code and respect each other to make the election a dignified exercise.

“I extend my special thanks to the Election Commission, friends in the security agencies, and all the government employees who are engaged in this great mission,” the PM said in her address. “This election will conclude fairly, independently, and in fear-free atmosphere because of the impartiality and hard work on the part of all of you.”

She said that the cultural festival Holi or Phagu Purnima, the celebration of color, and the election preparations are equally meaningful for us. “At this point, I feel content to see that we have arrived at present by passing through such a transition. We have been successful in moving towards the path of constitutional stability by establishing the rule of law,” the PM said. “This achievement is an outcome of the patience and collaboration of yours and ours, the entire Nepali citizens.”

Stating that all preparations for concluding the elections as scheduled were made by the Election Commission in a short and challenging time, the Prime Minister said the government and the EC are fully committed to conducting the election in an fair, and fear-free atmosphere.

“The province and local governments have significantly contributed to the election preparations within their respective jurisdictions. The government and all four security agencies have mobilised their respective resources in line with their capacities without any compromises,” PM Kaki reminded.

The Head of the interim government has, individually and on behalf of the government, extended heartfelt gratitude to the President for the role he played as a guardian in the election preparations. She also thanked all friendly nations and international organizations for their encouraging support and assistance, including physical, monetary, and technical support in election management. Karki acknowledged the support from the United Nations (UN) agencies for election purposes.

Surveillance intact against fabricated content

“I hereby inform you all that the government continues its surveillance of those forces aiming to spoil the election atmosphere by disseminating baseless and fabricated content and misleading assumptions through social media sites and some media,” the PM shared, appealing to all citizens not to be guided by such misleading content, not to support such forces, and to be ready to fulfill the historic responsibility before the nation.

Stating that the government will never promote impunity, PM Karki said it will never move back from taking action of any degree as per the law for any offense.

“This festival of colour gives the message of unity, goodwill, and enthusiasm. It strengthens the diversities existing in our society. I wish that the fusion of the colour of the election and the colour of Holi brings new enthusiasm to the nation. But again, I urge one and all to celebrate Holi with patience and not to make anyone observe it forcefully.”

Expressing her concerns over deepening unrest in the Middle East region, she said she was worried over the tension in Iran and its surroundings. As she said, the government is closely observing the latest developments there. “The security of Nepali brothers, sisters and youths who are presently in that region is our grave concern.”

She said, “All Nepali missions in the region have been activated so that no stone is left unturned in facilitating security for Nepalis. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs is monitoring the situation intensively. We are always by your side by all means available to us. The government is committed to ensuring the personal safety and security of every Nepali citizen, no matter where they are.”
translated:
काठमाण्डु, मिथिला मिरर: प्रधानमन्त्री सुशीला कार्की सभ मतदातासँ आग्रह केलन्हि अछि जे ५ मार्चमे होबय बला प्रतिनिधि सभा चुनावमे सक्रिय रूपसँ भाग ली जाहिसँ देश राजनीतिक स्थिरता आ समृद्धिमे प्रगति करत ।

पीएम कार्की आइ राष्ट्र केँ देल गेल संबोधन मे नेपाली लोकनि केँ मतदानक माध्यम सँ अपन आ बच्चा सभक भविष्य तय करबाक स्मरण करौलनि । पीएम कार्की नँ सब मतदाता स॑ आग्रह करतें हुअ॑ जोर देलकै कि, “मतदान खाली मतपत्र प॑ मुहर लगाना आरू नेता चुनना खाली मतपत्र प॑ मुहर लगाना आरू नेता चुनना नै छै, बल्कि एक क्षण छै कि भविष्य- आपने आरू अपनऽ बच्चा के निर्धारण करलऽ जाय ।”

पीएम कहलनि जे, HoR चुनाव के पूर्व संध्या पर हम सब गोटे स आग्रह करैत छी जे शांति व्यवस्था कायम राखू, शांति नेपाली के पहचान अछि।

हुनकऽ अनुसार देश निर्णायक क्षण म॑ छै, ई लेली ५ मार्च क॑ होबै वाला चुनाव व्यक्ति आरू देश केरऽ भविष्य तय करै के समय छै । ओ साझा केलनि जे ओ इतिहासक कठिन समय मे नेतृत्व लेने छलीह। सरकार केरऽ प्रमुख न॑ कहलकै कि हम्में ई बात क॑ राष्ट्र के प्रति अपनऽ जिम्मेदारी मान॑ छियै कि हम्में गंभीर स्थिति क॑ संभाली क॑ देश क॑ नेतृत्व देबै, हम्में हमेशा न्याय आरू ईमानदारी के पक्ष म॑ खड़ा रहै छेलियै, तदनुसार अपनऽ कर्तव्य के निर्वाह करै छेलियै ।

पीएम जी होली पर्व पर शुभकामना आ खुशी के आदान-प्रदान के सेहो आशा जतौलनि। ओ अपील केलनि जे, 5 मार्च के चुनाव के शांतिपूर्ण, निष्पक्ष आ ऐतिहासिक बनाबी।

हुनी आगू जेन जेड आन्दोलन के बाद के महत्वपूर्ण, चुनौतीपूर्ण आरू कठिन समय के याद दिलैलकै । पीएम कार्की न॑ जानकारी देलकै कि हिंसक राज्य स॑ शांतिपूर्ण समाधान म॑ संक्रमण आरू देश क॑ संवैधानिक पटरी प॑ लानै के पहिलऽ प्राथमिकता छेलै ।

जीवित लोकतंत्र के लिये चुनाव

पीएम कार्की न॑ सब राजनीतिक दल आरू निर्दलीय उम्मीदवार क॑ चुनावी मैदान लेली तत्परता लेली धन्यवाद देलकै ।’’ आपकऽ सक्रियता स॑ हमरऽ लोकतंत्र जीवित होय जाय छै । चुनाव स्वस्थ आरू प्रतिस्पर्धी माहौल म॑ होय छै । अलग-अलग विचार छै, लेकिन हमरा सब क॑ गलतफहमी आरू दुश्मनी क॑ पनाह नै देना चाहियऽ ।’’ हुनी जोर देलकै ।

पीएम राजनीतिक दल, उम्मीदवार आ समर्थक स आग्रह केलथि जे चुनाव संहिता क पालन करू आ एक दोसर क सम्मान करू ताकि चुनाव कए गरिमामय कवायद बनाउल जा सकए।

पीएम न॑ अपनऽ संबोधन म॑ कहलकै कि हम्में चुनाव आयोग, सुरक्षा एजेंसी म॑ दोस्त, आरू ई महान मिशन म॑ जुटलऽ सब सरकारी कर्मचारी क॑ विशेष धन्यवाद दै छियै । “अहाँ सब के निष्पक्षता आ मेहनत के कारण ई चुनाव निष्पक्ष, स्वतंत्र, आ भय मुक्त वातावरण में समाप्त होयत।”

ओ कहलनि जे, सांस्कृतिक पर्व होली या फागु पूर्णिमा, रंगक उत्सव, आ चुनावी तैयारी हमरा सब लेल ओतबे सार्थक अछि। पीएम कहलनि जे, एखन हम ई देखि संतुष्ट महसूस करैत छी जे हम सब एहन संक्रमण स गुजरैत वर्तमान समय मे पहुंचल छी, हम कानून के राज स्थापित क संवैधानिक स्थिरता के मार्ग दिस बढ़बा मे सफल भेलहुं अछि। “ई उपलब्धि अपनेक आ हमर सभक, समस्त नेपाली नागरिकक धैर्य आ सहयोगक परिणाम थिक।”

चुनाव निर्धारित के अनुसार समाप्त करय के सब तैयारी चुनाव आयोग द्वारा कम आ चुनौतीपूर्ण समय में कयल गेल कहैत प्रधानमंत्री कहलनि जे सरकार आ ईसी चुनाव के निष्पक्ष, आ भय मुक्त वातावरण में करय लेल पूर्ण रूप सं प्रतिबद्ध अछि।

पीएम काकी मोन पाड़लनि जे, ‘प्रांत आ स्थानीय सरकारक अपन-अपन क्षेत्राधिकार मे चुनावक तैयारी मे महत्वपूर्ण योगदान अछि, सरकार आ चारू सुरक्षा एजेंसी बिना कोनो समझौता केने अपन क्षमताक अनुरूप अपन-अपन संसाधन जुटा लेलक अछि।

अंतरिम सरकार केरऽ प्रमुख न॑ व्यक्तिगत रूप स॑ आरू सरकार के तरफ स॑ राष्ट्रपति केरऽ दिल स॑ आभार व्यक्त करलकै कि हुनी चुनावी तैयारी म॑ रक्षक के रूप म॑ भूमिका निभैलकै । हुनी चुनाव प्रबंधन मँ शारीरिक, मौद्रिक, आरू तकनीकी सहायता सहित सब दोस्ताना राष्ट्र आरू अंतर्राष्ट्रीय संगठन क उत्साहजनक समर्थन आरू सहायता लेली भी धन्यवाद देलकै । कार्की चुनावी उद्देश्य सँ संयुक्त राष्ट्र संघ (संयुक्त राष्ट्र) के एजेंसी के सहयोग के स्वीकार केलथि ।

मनगढ़ंत सामग्री के विरुद्ध निगरानी बरकरार

पीएम न॑ साझा करतें हुअ॑ कहलकै कि हम्में आपने सब क॑ सूचित करी रहलऽ छियै कि सरकार सोशल मीडिया साइट आरू कुछ मीडिया के माध्यम स॑ निराधार आरू मनगढ़ंत सामग्री आरू भ्रामक धारणा के प्रसार करी क॑ चुनावी माहौल क॑ खराब करै के लक्ष्य रखै वाला वू ताकतऽ प॑ अपनऽ निगरानी जारी रखै छै राष्ट्र।

सरकार कहियो दंडहीनता के बढ़ावा नै देत कहैत पीएम कार्की कहलनि जे, कोनो अपराध के लेल कानून के अनुसार कोनो डिग्री के कार्रवाई स कहियो पाछू नै हटत।

“रंग केरऽ ई पर्व एकता, सद्भावना, आरू उत्साह के संदेश दै छै । ई हमरऽ समाज म॑ मौजूद विविधता क॑ मजबूत करै छै । हमर कामना अछि जे चुनावक रंग आ होलीक रंगक फ्यूजन राष्ट्र मे नव उत्साह आनय। मुदा फेर हम एक आ सब स आग्रह करैत छी जे धैर्य स होली मनाउ आ ककरो जबरदस्ती पालन नहि कराउ।”

मध्य पूर्व क्षेत्र मँ गहरा अशांति के चिंता व्यक्त करतें हुअय हुनी कहलकै कि ईरान आरू ओकरौ आसपास के तनाव स॑ हुनी चिंतित छै । जेना कि ओ कहलीह जे सरकार ओतय के ताजा घटनाक्रम के बारीकी सं देख रहल अछि. “ओहि क्षेत्र मे वर्तमान मे जे नेपाली भाई बहिन आ युवा सब छथि हुनकर सुरक्षा हमर सबहक गंभीर चिंता अछि।”

ओ कहलनि जे, नेपाली के सुरक्षा के सुविधा देबय मे कोनो पाथर अपलट नहि रहय ताहि लेल क्षेत्र के सब नेपाली मिशन के सक्रिय कयल गेल अछि, विदेश मंत्रालय स्थिति पर गहन नजरि राखि रहल अछि, हम सब हमरा सब के उपलब्ध सब साधन स सदिखन अहाँक कात मे छी।सरकार हर नेपाली नागरिक के व्यक्तिगत सुरक्षा आ सुरक्षा सुनिश्चित करय लेल प्रतिबद्ध अछि, चाहे ओ कतहु होथि।”

Campaigning for Nepal’s so called “GenZ” election ends at midnight on Monday. Thereafter an Election Commission mandated cooling off period takes hold before voting opens on March 5th.

The tea leaves are hard to read even for the average Nepali, but it would appear that the communist parties (whether KP Sharma Oli’s CPN or Prachand’s Maoists) are out of favour with an electorate still angry over the deaths of 19 youth in police firing during the 2025 uprising.

Much of the attention has focused on Balendra Shah of the Rashtriya Swatantra Party (RSP), a rapper whose administrative performance as mayor of Kathmandu has won him a large following among young people.

Shah quit as Kathmandu mayor on Sunday and will file papers on Tuesday, formally seeking election from Jhapa-5, the constituency in south-eastern Jhapa district bordering India. It’s also Oli’s constituency nurtured over four elections.

“The RSP has established itself as a political force and could be the single largest party when the results are out but without being able to form a majority government,” is the assessment of Maj-Gen Binod Basnyat, formerly of the Nepal Amy and currently a political commentator, during a conversation with this correspondent in Kathmandu last Saturday.

“Balen is trying his best, using politics and social media as his outreach,” Basnyat said “but it is tough going. The Nepali Congress (NC) under new chief Gagan Thapa could be in second place and he has in various ways told people that he realises his party’s mistakes and they want to make amends.”

The irony is if the NC then under Sher Bahadur Deuba had read the tea leaves correctly, he could have yielded place to Thapa. Meaning there may have been no need for the GenZ uprising with Thapa taking over the mantle of the country’s youth.

But Deuba’s refusal to go quietly saw a struggle within the party and a special convention had to be called in January, resulting in Thapa’s election.

Devraj Chalise, NC spokesman told this correspondent at the party’s headquarters in Kathmandu, that they were confident of doing well under Thapa. But he gave the impression the NC leadership was looking beyond this election, seeing it perhaps as an interim period to strengthen itself and form its own government later on.

A cross-section of journalists in Kathmandu and Jhapa told this correspondent that the communists are completely out of favour in Nepal. They acknowledge that while former prime minister Oli has been able to overcome opposition from within to lead the party again, “the sense is he has been mismanaging things.”

Prachanda for his part has accepted mistakes and the need for change while ensuring he remains in the saddle. But for how much longer is not clear.

Of Nepal’s nearly 19 million electorate, around 800,000 are first time voters, meaning young people of 18 years and above. They are sick of the established politicians, they want somebody to stand for them, somebody clean. For now that man is Balen Shah.

नेपालक तथाकथित “जेनजेड” चुनावक प्रचार सोमदिन आधा राति मे समाप्त भ’ जाइत अछि । एकर बाद 5 मार्च कए मतदान खुलबा स पहिने चुनाव आयोग क अनिवार्य कूलिंग ऑफ पीरियड पकड़ि लैत अछि।

औसत नेपाली के लेल सेहो चाह के पात पढ़ब मुश्किल अछि, मुदा एहन बुझना जायत जे कम्युनिस्ट दल (चाहे केपी शर्मा ओली के नेकपा हो या प्रचंड के माओवादी) के पक्ष स बाहर अछि आ एकटा मतदाता एखनो 2025 के विद्रोह के दौरान पुलिस फायरिंग में 19 युवा के मौत पर नाराज अछि।

बहुत रास ध्यान राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी (आरएसपी) के बलेन्द्र शाह पर केंद्रित अछि, जे एकटा एहन रैपर छथि जिनकर प्रशासनिक प्रदर्शन काठमांडू के मेयर के रूप मे हुनका युवा के बीच बड़का फॉलोइंग मिलल अछि.

शाह रविदिन काठमांडू मेयर पद छोड़ि मंगलदिन कागजात दाखिल करताह, जाहि मे भारतक सीमावर्ती दक्षिण पूर्वी झापा जिलाक निर्वाचन क्षेत्र झापा-5 सँ औपचारिक रूप सँ चुनाव मँगताह। चारि चुनाव मे पोसल ओली के क्षेत्र सेहो अछि.

पिछला शनिदिन काठमांडू मे एहि संवाददाता सं बातचीत के दौरान नेपाल एमी के पूर्व मे रहल आ वर्तमान मे राजनीतिक टिप्पणीकार मेजर जनरल बिनोद बसन्यत के आकलन अछि जे, “रासपा एकटा राजनीतिक शक्ति के रूप मे स्थापित भ गेल अछि आओर जखन परिणाम निकलत त एकमात्र पैघ पार्टी भ सकैत अछि मुदा बहुमत के सरकार नहि बना सकल अछि.”

बसन्यात कहलनि जे, बलेन अपन पूरा प्रयास क रहल छथि, राजनीति आ सोशल मीडिया के अपन आउटरीच के रूप मे उपयोग क रहल छथि, मुदा ई कठिन काज अछि, नव प्रमुख गगन थापा के नेतृत्व मे नेपाली कांग्रेस (नेकपा) दोसर स्थान पर भ सकैत अछि आ ओ विभिन्न तरह स लोक के कहने छथि जे हुनका अपन पार्टी के गलती के अहसास भ रहल अछि आ ओ सब एकर सुधार करय चाहैत छथि।”

विडंबना ई अछि जे तखन शेरबहादुर देउबाक नेतृत्व मे नेकपा जँ चाहक पात सही पढ़ने रहितथि तऽ थापा केँ स्थान दऽ सकैत छलाह । मतलब देश के युवा के मेंटल थापा के अपना कब्जा में ल लेला के संग जेनजेड विद्रोह के कोनो जरूरत नहिं भ सकैत छल.

मुदा देउवा के चुपचाप जेबा सं मना करला सं पार्टी के भीतर संघर्ष भेल आओर जनवरी मे विशेष अधिवेशन बजाबय पड़ल छल, जकर परिणाम थापा के चुनाव भेल.

काठमांडू स्थित पार्टी मुख्यालय मे नेकपा प्रवक्ता देवराज चालीसे एहि संवाददाता केँ कहलनि जे, थापा मे नीक काज करबाक विश्वास अछि। लेकिन हुनी ई आभास देलकै कि नेकपा नेतृत्व ई चुनाव स॑ आगू देखै छै, ई शायद एकरा अंतरिम अवधि के रूप म॑ देखै छै कि हुनी खुद क॑ मजबूत करी क॑ बाद म॑ अपनऽ सरकार बनाबै ।

काठमांडू आ झापा के पत्रकार के क्रॉस सेक्शन एहि संवाददाता के कहलनि जे, नेपाल मे कम्युनिस्ट के पक्ष मे पूर्णतः बाहर अछि। ओ सब स्वीकार करैत छथि जे पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री ओली जखन कि पार्टी के फेर सं नेतृत्व करय लेल भीतर सं विरोध पर काबू पाबि सकलाह अछि, “मतलब ई अछि जे ओ चीज के गलत प्रबंधन करैत रहलाह अछि.”

प्रचण्ड अपनऽ तरफ स॑ गलती आरू बदलाव के जरूरत क॑ स्वीकार करी क॑ काठी म॑ ही रहना सुनिश्चित करी लेल॑ छै । मुदा कतेक दिन धरि ई स्पष्ट नहि अछि।

नेपाल के लगभग 1.9 करोड़ मतदाता मे सं करीब 8 लाख मतदाता पहिल बेर मतदाता छथिन्ह, मतलब 18 साल आओर ओहि सं बेसि के युवा. स्थापित राजनेता स बीमार छथि, चाहैत छथि जे कियो हुनका लेल ठाढ़ होथि, कियो साफ-सुथरा। फिलहाल ओ आदमी बलेन शाह अछि।

title: Nepal rivals rally on final day of election campaign - Yahoo News Singapore
description: Nepal rivals rally on final day of election campaign  Yahoo News Singapore
publisher.title: Yahoo News Singapore
full_article:
Nepal's election campaign entered its final day on Monday, six months after deadly anti-corruption protests toppled the government, with rival leaders making a last push in a tightly contested race.

The Himalayan republic will elect a new parliament on Thursday, replacing the interim government that has led the country of 30 million people since the September 2025 uprising in which at least 77 people were killed.

Sushila Karki, who is serving as prime minister until the vote, called for "peace and harmony" in a broadcast to the nation on Monday.

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_5272kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) { #_R_5272kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_9272kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { #_R_9272kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Karki, a former chief justice, also urged all to vote to "move the country forward on the path of political stability and prosperity".

"It is only with your active participation that our democracy will survive," she added.

Two weeks of campaigning have showcased a wave of younger candidates promising to tackle Nepal's woeful economy, challenging veteran politicians who have dominated for two decades and argue that their experience guarantees stability and security.

Among the key figures is KP Sharma Oli, the 74-year-old Marxist leader ousted as prime minister last year.

"Other candidates are all new, they have no experience, nothing," Oli told reporters as he campaigned on Monday.

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_5572kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) { #_R_5572kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_9572kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { #_R_9572kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

But he faces a high-profile challenge in his home constituency from former Kathmandu mayor Balendra Shah, a 35-year-old rapper-turned-politician widely known as Balen.

Their constituency of Jhapa-5 -- a mix of towns and farming settlements in Nepal's eastern plains, with the world's highest peaks on the horizon -- has emerged as a crucial battleground.

A local defeat for either man would likely end his bid to become prime minister.

- 'Old age' club -

"We have had a difficult few years with old leadership, and we need new energy," 50-year-old bus driver Pawan Jha told AFP, as he attended Shah's rally in Jhapa. "The protests were important to bring about change."

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_58n2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) { #_R_58n2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_98n2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { #_R_98n2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Shah, dressed in a sharp-cut black suit and sunglasses, waving from a car he was driving himself through farmlands of Jhapa, arrived at his rally to cheers, whistles and thumping music.

Oli, speaking to AFP, blamed "anarchic forces" for the violence that led to his removal and denied ordering security forces to kill protesters during the unrest.

Shah, from the centrist Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), has cast himself as a symbol of youth-driven political change.

"Gen Z's number one demand is good governance, because there is a high level of corruption in the country," Shah told AFP.

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_5b72kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) { #_R_5b72kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_9b72kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { #_R_9b72kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

But he is not the only one wooing the youth vote.

Aspiring prime minister Gagan Thapa, 49, the new head of the country's oldest party, Nepali Congress, told AFP he wanted to end the "old age" club of revolving veteran leaders.

Thapa, a former health minister who took charge in January, said he offers voters the "right mix of energy and experience".

The last day of campaigning coincides with Holi, the Hindu festival of colours, with some candidates combining celebrations with their rallies.

- 'Without any fear' -

Nearly 19 million registered voters will elect 275 members of the House of Representatives, the lower chamber of parliament -- 165 directly, with a further 110 chosen via a party-list proportional representation.

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_5en2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) { #_R_5en2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_9en2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { #_R_9en2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Analysts say the vote is unlikely to deliver an outright majority for any single party.

The youth-led protests in September were triggered by a brief social media ban, but were fuelled by anger at economic stagnation and an ageing elite seen as out of touch.

The World Bank estimates 82 percent of Nepal's workforce is in informal employment, with GDP per capita at $1,447 in 2024.

Millions are forced to seek work abroad -- and their remittances make up the equivalent of around a third of Nepal's GDP.

"Unemployment is a big issue, that needs to be resolved," said shopkeeper Mamata Devi Goswami, 49, who said she would vote for change.

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_5hn2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) { #_R_5hn2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

Advertisement Advertisement #_R_9hn2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { #_R_9hn2kqoqk5elubsnoqdbH1_ { display: flex; } iframe { max-width: 100vw; } }

"The youth should work here and earn their living, rather than go out of the country."

Over two days in September, 77 people were killed, scores were injured, and hundreds of buildings were set on fire -- including parliament, courts and a Hilton hotel.

It was the country's worst violence since a decade-long civil war ended in 2006.

भ्रष्टाचार विरोधी घातक विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद सरकार के गिरला के छह महीना बाद सोमदिन नेपाल के चुनाव प्रचार अंतिम दिन में प्रवेश केलक, जखन कि प्रतिद्वंदी नेता सब कड़ा मुकाबला के दौड़ में अंतिम धक्का देलक।

सितंबर २०२५ केरऽ विद्रोह के बाद स॑ तीन करोड़ लोगऽ के देश म॑ नेतृत्व करै वाला अंतरिम सरकार के जगह प॑ गुरुवार क॑ हिमालय गणराज्य नया संसद के चुनाव करतै, जेकरा म॑ कम स॑ कम ७७ लोगऽ के मौत होय गेलऽ छेलै ।

मतदान तक प्रधानमंत्री के रूप में कार्यरत सुशीला कार्की सोमदिन राष्ट्र के प्रसारण में “शांति आ सौहार्द” के आह्वान केलनि।

पूर्व मुख्य न्यायाधीश कार्की न॑ भी सब स॑ आग्रह करलकै कि “देश क॑ राजनीतिक स्थिरता आरू समृद्धि के रास्ता प॑ आगू बढ़ाबै लेली” वोट करलऽ जाय ।

ओ आगू कहलनि जे, अहां सभक सक्रिय भागीदारी सं मात्र हमर लोकतंत्र जीवित रहत।

दू सप्ताह केरऽ प्रचार म॑ नेपाल केरऽ दुखद अर्थव्यवस्था स॑ निपटै के वादा करै वाला छोटऽ उम्मीदवारऽ के लहर सामने ऐलऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ दू दशक स॑ हावी होय रहलऽ दिग्गज राजनेता सिनी क॑ चुनौती देलऽ गेलऽ छै आरू हुनकऽ अनुभव स्थिरता आरू सुरक्षा के गारंटी दै छै ।

प्रमुख हस्ती मे पिछला साल प्रधानमंत्री पद स बेदखल भेल 74 वर्षीय मार्क्सवादी नेता केपी शर्मा ओली शामिल छथि।

सोमदिन प्रचार के दौरान ओली पत्रकार सं बातचीत मे कहलनि जे, अन्य उम्मीदवार सब नव छथि, हुनका कोनो अनुभव नहि अछि, किछु नहि।

लेकिन हुनका अपनऽ गृह क्षेत्र म॑ काठमांडू केरऽ पूर्व मेयर बलेन्द्र शाह स॑ हाई प्रोफाइल चुनौती के सामना करना पड़॑ छै, जे ३५ वर्षीय रैपर स॑ राजनीतिज्ञ बनलऽ छै जेकरा व्यापक रूप स॑ बालेन के नाम स॑ जानलऽ जाय छै ।

हुनकऽ क्षेत्र झापा-५ -- नेपाल केरऽ पूर्वी मैदानऽ म॑ शहर आरू खेती के बस्ती के मिश्रण, जेकरऽ क्षितिज प॑ दुनिया केरऽ सबसें ऊंचऽ चोटी छै -- एगो महत्वपूर्ण युद्ध के मैदान के रूप म॑ सामने ऐलऽ छै ।

संभव अछि जे दुनू मे स कोनो आदमी क स्थानीय हार स हुनकर प्रधानमंत्री बनबाक दावेदारी समाप्त भ जाएत।

- 'वृद्धावस्था' क्लब - ८.

50 वर्षीय बस चालक पवन झा झापा मे शाह क रैली मे शामिल होइत एएफपी कए कहला जे पुरान नेतृत्व क संग हमरा सब कए किछु साल कठिन रहल अछि, आ हमरा सब कए नव ऊर्जा क जरूरत अछि। परिवर्तन लाबय लेल विरोध प्रदर्शन महत्वपूर्ण छल।'

शाह, तेज कटल कारी सूट आ धूप-चश्मा पहिरने, झापाक खेतक जमीन मे स्वयं चला रहल गाड़ी सँ लहराबैत, जय-जयकार, सीटी आ धमाकेदार संगीत मे अपन रैली मे पहुँचलाह।

ओली न॑ एएफपी स॑ बात करतें हुअ॑ हुनका हटाबै के कारण बनलऽ हिंसा लेली “अराजकतावादी ताकत” क॑ जिम्मेदार ठहरौलकै आरू अशांति के दौरान सुरक्षा बलऽ क॑ प्रदर्शनकारी सिनी क॑ मारै के आदेश दै स॑ इनकार करलकै ।

केंद्रवादी राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी (आरएसपी) के शाह अपना के युवा संचालित राजनीतिक परिवर्तन के प्रतीक के रूप में पेश केने छथिन्ह.

शाह एएफपी स कहलथि जे जनरल जेड क नंबर वन मांग सुशासन अछि, किया कि देश मे भ्रष्टाचार क स्तर बेसी अछि।

मुदा युवा वोट के लुभाबय वाला सिर्फ ओ नहिं छथिन्ह.

देश केरऽ सबसें पुरानऽ पार्टी नेपाली कांग्रेस केरऽ नयका प्रमुख ४९ वर्षीय प्रधानमंत्री केरऽ आकांक्षी गगन थापा न॑ एएफपी क॑ बतैलकै कि हुनी घूमऽ वाला दिग्गज नेता सिनी के “वृद्धावस्था” क्लब क॑ समाप्त करना चाहै छै ।

जनवरी म॑ पदभार संभाल॑ वाला पूर्व स्वास्थ्य मंत्री थापा न॑ कहलकै कि हुनी मतदाता सिनी क॑ ऊर्जा आरू अनुभव के सही मिश्रण के प्रस्ताव दै छै ।

प्रचार के अंतिम दिन हिन्दू रंग के पर्व होली के संग मेल खाइत अछि, जाहि मे किछ उम्मीदवार अपन रैली के संग उत्सव के संयोजन करैत छथिन्ह.

- 'बिना कोनो भय के' -

लगभग 1.9 करोड़ पंजीकृत मतदाता प्रतिनिधि सभा, संसद के निचला सदन के 275 सदस्य के चुनाव करताह -- 165 सीधा, आओर 110 सदस्य के पार्टी-सूची आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व के माध्यम सं चुनल जायत.

विश्लेषक के कहनाय छनि जे एहि वोट सं कोनो एक पार्टी के एकदम सं बहुमत मिलय के संभावना कम अछि.

सितंबर म॑ युवा सिनी के नेतृत्व म॑ करलऽ गेलऽ विरोध प्रदर्शन के शुरुआत सोशल मीडिया प॑ संक्षिप्त प्रतिबंध के वजह स॑ करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै, लेकिन आर्थिक ठहराव आरू बुढ़ापा केरऽ अभिजात वर्ग क॑ संपर्क स॑ बाहर मानलऽ जाय वाला एगो बुढ़ापा के आक्रोश स॑ एकरा बढ़ी गेलऽ छेलै ।

विश्व बैंकक अनुमान अछि जे नेपालक ८२ प्रतिशत कार्यबल अनौपचारिक रोजगार मे अछि, जखन कि २०२४ मे प्रति व्यक्ति सकल घरेलू उत्पाद १,४४७ डॉलर अछि ।

लाखों लोक विदेश मे काज ताकय लेल मजबूर छथि -- आ हुनकर रेमिटैंस नेपाल के सकल घरेलू उत्पाद के लगभग एक तिहाई के बराबर अछि.

परिवर्तन के लेल वोट देबय वाला 49 वर्षीय दुकानदार ममता देवी गोस्वामी कहली जे बेरोजगारी एकटा पैघ मुद्दा अछि, जकर समाधान के जरूरत अछि।

"युवा सब के एतय काज करबाक चाही आ अपन रोजी रोटी कमाबय के चाही, नहि कि देश स बाहर जेबाक चाही."

सितंबर म॑ दू दिन म॑ ७७ लोगऽ के मौत होय गेलै, दर्जनों लोग घायल होय गेलै, आरू सैकड़ों इमारतऽ म॑ आग लगाय देलऽ गेलै -- जेकरा म॑ संसद, कोर्ट आरू हिल्टन होटल भी शामिल छै ।

2006 मे एक दशक स चलि रहल गृहयुद्ध समाप्त भेलाक बाद इ देश क सबस खराब हिंसा छल।

बुर-पजम/मजव

title: Meet Sunmaya Budha: Nepal’s Trailblazing Ultra Runner - Women's Running
description: Meet Sunmaya Budha: Nepal’s Trailblazing Ultra Runner  Women's Running
publisher.title: Women's Running
full_article:
Sunmaya Budha joined Kailas FUGA as a sponsored athlete in 2024, already firmly established as one of the world’s leading female trail runners.

Ranked 8th globally in the 100km in 2024 and the top female trail runner in Nepal, she continues to rise through the ultra ranks.

Her recent second-place finish at the World Championship Long Trail confirmed her status as a serious force on the international stage.

Beyond racing, Sunmaya is passionate about giving back, inspiring aspiring runners across Asia through training camps, community work and charitable projects.

Here, she talks about her journey from West Jumla to the world stage, the mountains that shaped her, and her mission to help more women run free.
translated:
सुनमाया बुधा न॑ २०२४ म॑ कैलास फुगा म॑ प्रायोजित एथलीट के रूप म॑ शामिल होलै, जे पहल॑ स॑ ही दुनिया केरऽ प्रमुख महिला ट्रेल धावक म॑ स॑ एक के रूप म॑ मजबूती स॑ स्थापित छै ।

2024 मे 100 किलोमीटर मे वैश्विक स्तर पर 8म आ नेपाल मे शीर्ष महिला ट्रेल धावक मे रहल ओ अल्ट्रा रैंक क माध्यम स आगू बढ़ैत छथि।

हाल ही म॑ वर्ल्ड चैंपियनशिप लॉन्ग ट्रेल म॑ हुनकऽ दूसरऽ स्थान प॑ खतम होय क॑ अंतरराष्ट्रीय मंच प॑ हुनकऽ एगो गंभीर ताकत के दर्जा के पुष्टि होय गेलै ।

रेसिंग स॑ परे, सुनमाया क॑ वापस दै के शौक छै, जेकरा स॑ पूरा एशिया म॑ आकांक्षी धावकऽ क॑ प्रशिक्षण शिविर, सामुदायिक काम आरू धर्मार्थ परियोजना के माध्यम स॑ प्रेरित करलऽ जाय छै ।

यहाँ, हुनी पश्चिम जुमला स॑ विश्व पटल तलक के यात्रा, हुनका आकार दै वाला पहाड़, आरू अधिक महिला क॑ मुक्त दौड़ै म॑ मदद करै के अपनऽ मिशन के बारे म॑ बतैलकै ।

title: US-Iran War: Nepal Suspends Job Approvals for 12 West Asian Nations - WION
description: US-Iran War: Nepal Suspends Job Approvals for 12 West Asian Nations  WION
publisher.title: WION
full_article:
Nepal has suspended the issuance of labour approvals (work permits) for foreign employment to 12 Middle Eastern and Gulf countries amid escalating tensions in West Asia following the ongoing US-Israel-Iran conflict. The decision was taken by the Ministry of Labour, Employment and Social Security in view of deteriorating security conditions in the region, and will remain in effect until further notice.

इजरायल-ईरान युद्ध : ईरान न॑ खामेनी केरऽ मौत प॑ ४० दिन के शोक, ७ सार्वजनिक छुट्टी के घोषणा करलकै

अमेरिका आरू इजरायल न॑ ईरान प॑ हमला करलकै : ईरान के पास तैनात रहला के दौरान यूएसएस जेराल्ड आर फोर्ड क॑ भारी शौचालय संकट के सामना करना पड़लै

इजरायल न॑ ईरान प॑ हमला करलकै : हड़ताल के बाद खामेनी परिसर केरऽ पहलऽ उपग्रह छवि

अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध : ईरान केरऽ होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य बंद होय के चेतावनी स॑ वैश्विक जहाजरानी म॑ बाधा पहुँचलै

इजरायल-ईरान युद्ध : ओमान के मध्यस्थता के बातचीत युद्ध के रोकय में असफल रहल

ईरान-अमेरिका युद्ध : खाड़ी के तनाव के बीच ईरान न॑ होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य म॑ जहाजऽ क॑ चेतावनी देलकै, पासेज के “अनुमति नै”

इजराइल पर हमला | दुबई : बुर्ज अल अरब होटल मे ड्रोन के मलबा स आगि लागल

ईरान-अमेरिका युद्ध : ईरान मे अमेरिकी-इजरायल हमला मे आईआरजीसी प्रमुख मोहम्मद पकपुर मे मौत के पुष्टि | WION

अमेरिकी‐इजराइल ने ईरान पर हमला | कतार : ईरानी केरऽ २ मिसाइल न॑ अमेरिका केरऽ अल उदेद हवाई अड्डा क॑ निशाना बनाबै के काम करलकै

अमेरिका-इजरायल न॑ ईरान प॑ हमला करलकै : अमेरिका न॑ हाइफा के किनारे दुनिया केरऽ सबस॑ बड़ऽ युद्धपोत क॑ तैनात करलकै

अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध : खाड़ी भर मँ तेहरान मँ हमला जारी छै, ईरान नँ कहलकै कि नयका लहर नँ इजरायल आरू अमेरिकी अड्डा क निशाना बनाबै छै

title: Nepal's Interim PM Urges Full Voter Turnout Ahead of Crucial Election - Devdiscourse
description: Nepal's Interim PM Urges Full Voter Turnout Ahead of Crucial Election  Devdiscourse
publisher.title: Devdiscourse
full_article:
Nepal's interim Prime Minister, Sushila Karki, made a national appeal on Monday urging citizens to vote in the crucial House of Representatives election set for March 5. Karki described this moment as 'historic and important,' emphasizing the significance of each ballot in determining the nation's path to stability and prosperity.

Reflecting on her tenure since September 12, Karki expressed satisfaction with the progress made by transitioning from a period of youth-driven unrest to a constitutionally stable government. She reassured that the achievements were due to the people's collective resolve, steering the country towards peace and lawfulness.

With elections imminent, Karki urged voters to prioritize casting their votes, stressing the transformative power of their decision-making. She also called for political entities to abide by rules during the campaign silence period, ensuring free and fair elections. Additionally, she warned against the spread of misinformation while extending Holi festivities' greetings and noting concerns about tensions in West Asia impacting Nepalis there. As her administrative term concludes, Karki reaffirmed a focus on justice and the role of elected representatives in shaping Nepal's future.

(With inputs from agencies.)
translated:
नेपाल केरऽ अंतरिम प्रधानमंत्री सुशीला कार्की न॑ सोमवार क॑ राष्ट्रीय अपील करलकै कि ५ मार्च क॑ होबै वाला प्रतिनिधि सभा केरऽ महत्वपूर्ण चुनाव म॑ नागरिकऽ स॑ मतदान करै के आग्रह करलकै ।

12 सितम्बर स अपन कार्यकाल पर चिंतन करैत कार्की युवा संचालित अशांति क दौर स संवैधानिक रूप स स्थिर सरकार मे संक्रमण क प्रगति पर संतोष व्यक्त केलथि। ओ आश्वासन देलनि जे ई उपलब्धि जनताक सामूहिक संकल्पक कारण अछि, जे देश केँ शांति आ वैधता दिस संचालित करैत अछि ।

चुनाव आसन्न रहला पर कार्की अपन निर्णय लेबय के परिवर्तनकारी शक्ति पर जोर दैत मतदाता सब सं अपन मतदान के प्राथमिकता देबय लेल आग्रह केलनि। प्रचार मौन अवधि मे राजनीतिक संस्था कए नियम क पालन करबा स सेहो आह्वान केलथि, जाहि स स्वतंत्र आ निष्पक्ष चुनाव सुनिश्चित कैल जाए। एकरऽ अलावा होली केरऽ उत्सव केरऽ शुभकामना दै के साथ-साथ गलत सूचना फैलाबै के खिलाफ चेतावनी देलकै आरू पश्चिम एशिया म॑ तनाव के चिंता क॑ नोट करी क॑ वहाँ के नेपाली सिनी क॑ प्रभावित करै के चिंता करलकै । प्रशासनिक कार्यकाल समाप्त होइते कार्की न्याय पर ध्यान आ नेपालक भविष्यक आकार देबा मे निर्वाचित प्रतिनिधिक भूमिका पर दोबारा पुष्टि केलनि ।

title: Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. - Two Decades of Award-Winning Himalayan Adventure to the World - openPR.com
description: Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. - Two Decades of Award-Winning Himalayan Adventure to the World  openPR.com
publisher.title: openPR.com
full_article:
Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. - Two Decades of Award-Winning Himalayan Adventure to the World

Nepal Mountain Bike Adventure

https://www.nepalmountainbike.com/

https://www.nepalmountainbike.com/mtb-tours

https://www.nepalmountainbike.com/e-mtb-tours

https://www.nepalmountainbike.com/about-us

POKHARA, NEPAL - Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd., formerly known as Pokhara Mountain Bike Adventure (PMTBA),today announced its official national rebrand and expansion, cementing its position as Nepal's leading mountain bike tour operator and the premier gateway for Himalayan cycling adventures.Building on more than two decades of guiding international riders through the world's most spectacular mountain terrain, the company's transformation from a regional Pokhara-based operator to a nationally recognized brand signals a bold new chapter for adventure tourism in the country.The company's rebrand coincides with a surge in global interest in adventure travel and sustainable tourism, trends that have placed Nepal, already famous for its Everest expeditions and classic trekking routes, firmly on the radar of the international mountain biking community. Nepal MTB Adventures intends to lead that conversation.Nepal: The World's Greatest Destination for Mountain Biking - and Why NowNepal has long been recognized as the world's ultimate destination for trekkers and mountaineers, but in recent years, the country has emerged as a global hotspot for mountain biking. Its extraordinary topography, ranging from subtropical river valleys at 500 meters to high-altitude desert plateaus above 4,000 meters, creates a diversity of terrain that is simply unrivaled anywhere on earth.Ancient trade routes, former mule tracks, and remote single-track trails wind through landscapes that most of the world has never seen: the eroded red-rock canyons of Mustang, the rhododendron forests of the Annapurna foothills, the sacred valleys near the Tibetan border, and the terraced farmland of the Kathmandu Valley. For mountain bikers, Nepal is not just a destination - it is a revelation.At the same time, global adventure tourism is booming. According to industry analysts, the adventure travel market is growing faster than any other segment of the tourism industry, driven by a new generation of travelers who seek authentic, physically engaging, and culturally immersive experiences. Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. is perfectly positioned to meet this demand with the experience, infrastructure, and passion to deliver the kind of transformative journeys that riders will talk about for the rest of their lives.A Comprehensive Portfolio of Himalayan AdventuresNepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. offers one of the most complete menus of Himalayan cycling and adventure experiences available anywhereEvery tour is designed to balance challenge with safety, immersion with comfort, and adventure with cultural respect - guided by local experts who know these trails like the back of their hands.1. Guided MTB ToursNepal MTB Adventures offers an extensive roster of guided mountain bike tours for all ability levels, from short day rides to epic multi-week expeditions. Highlights include:• Annapurna Circuit Mountain Biking Tour (15 Days / 14 Nights, from USD 2,527): One of the world's most iconic cycling routes, circumnavigating the Annapurna massif through high passes, deep gorges, and traditional Gurung villages. Riders cross the legendary Thorong La Pass at 5,416 meters - one of the highest navigable mountain passes on the planet.• Upper Mustang Mountain Biking Tour (16 Days / 15 Nights, from USD 3,239): A rare journey into the remote, once-forbidden Kingdom of Mustang, where ancient Tibetan culture survives in eroded cliff dwellings and wind-carved canyons. This is the most exclusive trail corridor in Nepal, accessible only with a special restricted area permit.• Lower Mustang Cross-Country Mountain Biking Tour (10 Days / 9 Nights, from USD 2,296): A spectacular introduction to the Mustang valley, passing through traditional Thakali villages, apple orchid country, and the dramatic landscapes around Jomsom and Muktinath.• Annapurna Circuit and Upper Mustang Combined Tour (22 Days / 21 Nights): For riders who refuse to choose, this epic combined route takes in both of Nepal's greatest cycling corridors in a single unforgettable journey.• Everest / Pikey Peak Mountain Biking Tour (7 Days / 6 Nights): Explore the high ridgelines of the Everest region from Pikey Peak, with panoramic views of Everest, Lhotse, Makalu, and Kanchenjunga stretching across the horizon - one of the finest Himalayan panoramas accessible by mountain bike.• Lhasa to Kathmandu Mountain Bike Tour (19-23 Days): An extraordinary international expedition descending from the Tibetan Plateau through the Himalayan passes into Nepal, crossing some of the most dramatic high-altitude terrain on earth.• Mountain Biking Tour in Bhutan (10 Days / 9 Nights): A cross-border adventure through the Kingdom of Bhutan, widely regarded as the world's most committed sustainable tourism destination, combining cycling with cultural exploration of Buddhist monasteries, dzongs, and pristine Himalayan valleys.• Kathmandu and Pokhara Day Tours: For travelers short on time, the company offers expertly guided single-day MTB experiences including the Kakani Sky Trail above the Kathmandu Valley and the Thamel to Budhanilkantha route through historical and cultural landmarks.2. E-MTB Tours - The Himalayas, ElectrifiedRecognizing that electric mountain bikes are transforming adventure tourism worldwide, Nepal MTB Adventures has built a comprehensive E-MTB tourprogram that makes the Himalayas accessible to a broader range of riders - including those who want to push their limits without being limited by fitness or altitude. -• Ultimate E-MTB Tour: Kathmandu, Chitwan to Mustang (11 Days / 10 Nights): A sweeping journey from Nepal's cultural capital through the jungle lowlands of Chitwan National Park and up into the dramatic desert landscapes of Mustang - an extraordinary range of terrain, culture, and altitude.• E-MTB Tour Kathmandu to Pokhara (13 Days / 12 Nights): A classic Nepal traverse on electric mountain bikes, riding through hill country, river valleys, and lakeside scenery between the country's two most iconic cities.• E-MTB Upper Mustang (15 Days / 14 Nights): Experience the high desert kingdom of Upper Mustang with the added capability of an e-bike, allowing riders to explore deeper into the restricted area with more energy for enjoying the landscape and culture.• Pokhara E-MTB Tours (Day and Multi-Day): Explore Pokhara's spectacular surroundings - including the Sarangkot sunrise viewpoint, Bhumdi trail network, and the World Peace Stupa - on electric bikes with professional local guides.3. Guided Trekking PackagesFor travelers who want to combine their cycling adventure with Nepal's legendary trekking routes, Nepal MTB Adventures offers fully guided trekking packages across the country's most celebrated trails:• Annapurna Base Camp Trek (14 Days / 13 Nights, 108 km, from USD 1,474): A classic Himalayan trek through the Modi Khola valley to the glacier amphitheater of Annapurna Base Camp, surrounded by peaks above 7,000 meters.• Annapurna Circuit Trek (14 Days / 13 Nights, 153+ km, from USD 1,573): One of the world's most celebrated long-distance trekking routes, crossing the Thorong La Pass and passing through diverse ecological zones, ethnic communities, and dramatic landscapes.• Ghorepani-Poonhill Trek (8 Days / 7 Nights, 70 km, from USD 948): The ideal shorter trek for those seeking iconic Himalayan views - the Poonhill sunrise viewpoint is one of the most photographed mountain panoramas on earth, with Dhaulagiri, Annapurna, Machhapuchhre, and dozens of other peaks filling the horizon.• Mardi Himal Trek (9 Days / 8 Nights): A quieter, less-traveled alternative in the Annapurna region that rewards adventurous trekkers with solitude, pristine forests, and stunning close-up views of Machhapuchhre (Fishtail Mountain).4. Motor Tours and Adventure ActivitiesRounding out its adventure portfolio, Nepal MTB Adventures also offers motorbike tours through the Pokhara valley and surrounding hill country - combining the thrill of two wheels with the freedom to cover more ground. Additional activities including paragliding above the Annapurna Range and boating on the iconic Phewa Lake are available to complement any itinerary.World-Class Bikes: Rentals, Sales, and Full Workshop ServicesNepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. is not just a tour operator - it is the most fully equipped mountain biking hub in Nepal. Whether a rider needs to hire a high-performance bike for a week-long expedition, purchase a new machine to keep, or have their own bike serviced before or after a tour, the company provides complete end-to-end support.Premium Bike Rental FleetThe company's rental fleet features some of the finest mountain bikes available in South Asia, including:• Scott Genius 940 - Available for daily and multi-day rental. A full-suspension all-mountain bike engineered for enduro and single-track riding in demanding terrain. Rental from USD 75/day.• Scott Genius 950 2022/2023 - Available for purchase directly through the company's online shop. One of the best all-mountain bikes available in Nepal. Priced at USD 3,154.99.• A curated selection of additional MTB and E-MTB models suited to different riding styles, abilities, and tour requirements.Full-Service Bike WorkshopThe company's on-site workshop in Pokhara is staffed by trained mechanics who provide comprehensive bike servicing, maintenance, and repair. For touring riders bringing their own bikes to Nepal, this is an invaluable resource - ensuring that equipment is trail-ready before departure and can be serviced efficiently during or after a tour. The workshop services all major brands and components.A Commitment to Sustainable and Responsible Adventure TourismNepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. takes its responsibility to Nepal's natural environment and local communities seriously. The company has adopted a formal Sustainability Pledge that guides every aspect of its operations - from route selection and waste management to guide employment practices and community engagement.All tours are designed to minimize environmental impact while maximizing positive contributions to the local economy. The company employs local guides, supports local accommodation providers and tea houses along its routes, and actively avoids practices that degrade trail environments or disturb sensitive ecosystems -A portion of tour revenues is reinvested into trail maintenance and local community development initiativesWhy the World's Riders Choose Nepal MTB AdventuresIn an increasingly crowded adventure tourism market, Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. stands apart through a combination of factors that no competitor can fully replicate:• 20+ Years of Unmatched Local Expertise: Two decades of guiding riders on Nepal's trails means the team knows every switchback, every teahouse, every weather pattern, and every cultural nuance that makes the difference between a good trip and an unforgettable one. This depth of local knowledge is the company's most valuable asset.• 10,000+ Satisfied Customers from Around the World: A track record that speaks for itself. The company's customer base spans riders from Australia, the United Kingdom, the United States, Europe, Asia, and beyond - and its reputation is built almost entirely on word of mouth and verified customer reviews.• Award-Winning Operations: Nepal MTB Adventures has been recognized by the tourism industry for its quality, safety standards, and contribution to sustainable adventure tourism in Nepal.• Professional Local Guide Team: Every guided tour is led by experienced, certified, and passionate local guides who bring not just trail knowledge but cultural insight, language skills, and genuine personal warmth to every riding day.• World-Class Equipment: From the Scott Genius rental fleet to the helmets, protective gear, and support vehicles provided on multi-day tours, the company's equipment standards match those of leading operators anywhere in the world.• End-to-End Support: From the moment a rider books a tour to the moment they leave Nepal, the team provides comprehensive support - including airport pickups, acclimatization advice, visa guidance, equipment fitting, daily mechanical support on tour, accommodation booking, and post-tour follow-up.• Safety First, Always: All guides are trained in wilderness first aid. Support vehicles accompany all multi-day tours. Emergency evacuation protocols are in place for every route. Riders can explore Nepal's most remote trails with the confidence that their safety is the company's first priority.• Transparent Pricing and Flexible Booking: All tour prices are published in full on the website, with no hidden fees. Multi-currency payment support and flexible cancellation policies make booking easy for riders from anywhere in the world.Media & Press InquiriesNepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd.Baidam, Hallan Chowk, Lakeside, Pokhara 33700, NepalOffice: +977 61 456224 | WhatsApp: +9779804134788General: nepalmountainb@gmail.comAbout Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd.Nepal MTB Adventures Pvt. Ltd. (formerly Pokhara Mountain Bike Adventure / PMTBA) is Nepal's #1 mountain bike tour and rental company. Headquartered in Baidam, Hallan Chowk, Lakeside, Pokhara 33700, Nepal, the company was founded over 20 years ago with the mission of sharing Nepal's extraordinary trail network with riders from around the world. Today, it is Nepal's most experienced and most decorated adventure cycling operator, offering guided MTB tours, E-MTB tours, trekking packages, motor tours, bike rentals, workshop services, and adventure activities across Nepal, Bhutan, and the Lhasa-Kathmandu corridor in Tibet.Nepal MTB Adventures is committed to responsible, sustainable tourism practices that protect Nepal's natural environment and contribute to local community development. The company employs a team of professional local guides, mechanics, and support staff who bring unmatched local knowledge and genuine hospitality to every adventure. All tours are backed by comprehensive safety protocols, world-class equipment, and end-to-end logistical support.
